label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 8

extraction.one_line_summary: JAKOBSEN Fabio won the sprint after skipping the intermediate sprint to conserve position, taking the green jersey from Philipsen.
tactical_patterns: Jakobsen deliberately skipped intermediate sprint unlike Philipsen, preserving leadout positioning advantage for final sprint and taking green jersey.
Movistar attacked with 30km remaining causing splits that isolated Nielsen, revealing vulnerability in positioning before sprint funnels.
Quick-Step's Senechal hero turn paradoxically dropped Almeida from his own leadout, exposing coordination breakdown under high pace.

rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: positive: demonstrated tactical discipline skipping intermediate sprint paid off with win and green jersey takeover
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: negative: winning intermediate sprint left him exposed without proper positioning in final, finishing only third
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: negative: consistently cannot stay with his own leadout train under maximum pace, fundamental sprint positioning weakness
rider_signals.NIELSEN Magnus Cort: negative: caught out by Movistar's 30km attack suggesting poor positioning awareness in transitional moments
rider_signals.SENECHAL Florian: positive: solo leadout effort strong enough to string out entire field but left Almeida behind
